title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
